summary: Completed Phase 2+3 backend and frontend testing for Ariadne Editorial Studio. Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). Fixed 3 critical frontend Select component errors blocking thread detail view.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: SelectItem with empty string value crashed the page. Changed value="" to value="_unassigned" for unassigned option
FIXED: SelectItem with empty string value crashed the page. Changed value="" to value="_none" for 'Nessun template' option
FIXED: SelectItem with empty string value. Changed value="" to value="_none" for 'Nessuno' option

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - should add DialogDescription for accessibility
AI draft generation and assistant work correctly with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple threads (TEST_Frontend_Import, TEST_detail_thread, etc.) during backend and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2+3 complete: Inbox workflow (import->classify->draft->approve), routing rules, email templates, programs/cohorts/members, materials, journey (3 tabs with steps), and AI assistant all working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug. AI integrations (draft generation, assistant) use Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations - working correctly.

phase2_inbox.import_thread: PASS - Creates thread with auto-classification via routing rules
phase2_inbox.list_threads_tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs (Tutti/I miei/Non assegnati/In approvazione) working
phase2_inbox.thread_detail: PASS - Shows messages, draft section, assign dropdown, archive button
phase2_inbox.assign_thread: PASS - Assigns to user and updates status to 'in_lavorazione'
phase2_inbox.archive_thread: PASS - Archives and updates status to 'archiviato'
phase2_inbox.generate_ai_draft: PASS - AI generates professional Italian response with attention notes
phase2_inbox.update_draft: PASS - Can edit subject and body
phase2_inbox.submit_approval: PASS - Editor can submit for approval

phase3_materials.list_materials: PASS - Empty state for users not in cohorts

phase3_journey.list_templates: PASS - 3 templates (formazione/5 steps, credenziale/4 steps, business/5 steps)
phase3_journey.tabs_ui: PASS - All 3 tabs working with cards showing progress

phase3_assistant.query: PASS - AI responds with course information from context
